name: titan-nova
description: Titan Nova Flask dashboard and WhatsApp gateway

scripts.check:python: python -m py_compile flask_app.py backend/run.py backend/wsgi.py backend/role_router_proxy.py scripts/health_check.py tests/test_structure.py
scripts.check:node: node --check Gateway.js && node --check gateway/roleRouter.js && node --check gateway/roleRouterUi.js && node --check bot/index.js && node --check ecosystem.config.js
scripts.check: npm run check:python && npm run check:node
